# Clang failed to parse constraints in InlineAsm for invalid input constraint "#0" in asm stmt

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173611
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clang:codegen, crash, inline-asm, generated by fuzzer

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/vrdo6xEhY

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

Failure value returned from cantFail wrapped call
failed to parse constraints

## Code
```c
unsigned int foo(void) {
  unsigned int a = 0;
  unsigned int b;

  asm volatile("" : "=r"(b) : "0"(0));
  a += b;
  asm volatile("" : "=r"(b) : "0"(0));
  a += b;
  asm volatile("" : "=r"(b) : "#0"(0));
  a += b;
  asm volatile("" : "=r"(b) : "0"(0));
  a += b;

  return a;
}
```

## Code
```c
unsigned int foo(void) {
  unsigned int a = 0;
  unsigned int b;

  asm volatile("" : "=r"(b) : "0"(0));
  a += b;
  asm volatile("" : "=r"(b) : "0"(0));
  a += b;
  asm volatile("" : "=r"(b) : "#<!-- -->0"(0));
  a += b;
  asm volatile("" : "=r"(b) : "0"(0));
  a += b;

  return a;
}
```
</details>


---

### Comment 2 - keinflue

Reduces further to
```cpp
void foo(void) {
  int b;
  asm("" : "=r"(b) : "#0"(0));
}
```
Goes back to Clang 3.2: https://godbolt.org/z/3EzTMTxcb

There are similar issues, but they do not seem to be the exact same cause, in particular https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/128961, and less similar: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/121901, https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/58389, https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/50219

---
